title: App Settings - General - Licenses no wifi  [New]
scenario: License Source links show "Something is wrong" error instead of loading properly in App Settings > General > Licenses
steps: 1. Turn off Wi-Fi on the Android device.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to App Settings → General → Licenses.
4. Tap on a license link (e.g., MIT, Apache 2.0, etc.).
5. Observe the license screen — verify the headline, description, and Cancel (X) button are visible.
6. Tap the Source link within the license screen.
expected: The Source link loads the corresponding license source content properly.
